day5_morning_start.name: Me
day5_morning_start.text: *Day 5. The last day. I opened my eyes.*

day5_morning_start_2.name: Me
day5_morning_start_2.text: *I look out the window. Gray sky. Looks like rain.*

day5_morning_gate.name: Me
day5_morning_gate.text: *School gate. Wrapped in chains. Every exit besides the front gate is... blocked.*

day5_morning_gate_2.name: Me
day5_morning_gate_2.text: *Students pass through the gate as if nothing is wrong. As if... they can't see it.*

day5_morning_gate_3.name: Me
day5_morning_gate_3.text: *Three people stand side by side in front of the gate.*

day5_morning_welcome.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_morning_welcome.text: "Good morning, {name}. Today is a special day."

day5_morning_welcome_2.name: Han Sea
day5_morning_welcome_2.text: "{name}! Let's be together all day today."

day5_morning_welcome_3.name: School Nurse
day5_morning_welcome_3.text: "I need to finish your health checkup today. Come to the nurse's office after school, okay?"

day5_morning_welcome_4.name: Me
day5_morning_welcome_4.text: *Three identical smiles overlap before my eyes. The same smile. ...A predator's smile.*

day5_morning_classroom.name: Me
day5_morning_classroom.text: *The classroom. Words written on the blackboard.*

day5_morning_class.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_morning_class.text: "Today is a special lesson. Let's talk about 'graduation'."

day5_morning_class_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_morning_class_2.text: "Graduation is the end of a process. When the process is complete... you move on to a new place."

day5_morning_class_4.name: Me
day5_morning_class_4.text: "As you all know, the world outside school is cold and dangerous. You get hurt, you fail, you break..."

day5_morning_note.name: Me
day5_morning_note.text: *A note stuck under my desk. Yuna's handwriting.*

day5_morning_note_alt.name: Me
day5_morning_note_alt.text: *Class ended. There's nobody to help me.*

day5_morning_note_2.name: Me
day5_morning_note_2.text: *'Lunch. Old building, 3rd floor. I found an escape route. - Yuna'*

day5_morning_end.name: Me
day5_morning_end.text: *Morning is over. Time crawls like the clock has stopped.*
